feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Batman And Harley Quinn Under The Red Hood.
entry.summary:
Author: Jakebob555

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,214Chapters: 14/15Kudos: 7

Summary: One year post the Funeral of Jason Todd Bruce Wayne and Harleen Quinzel's friendship is going strong. With the former Clown Princess of Crime now out of Arkham and attempting to return to Civilian Life. Elsewhere Tim Drake continues training under Bruce to take on the mantle of Robin, things take a dark turn though when a new foe taking up the name and mantle of the Red Hood appears on the streets of Gotham hunting down members of the Joker's gang as well as the local Drug Trade. Who is this mysterious new Vigilante and why does he seem to know Batman?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death

entry.title: "Thought You'd Like To See"
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,016Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: Bruce has come into possession of an unmarked USB from an anonymous sender. The note included with the device simply states “Red Hood and Nightwing in a compromising position - thought you’d like to see”.Bruce wasn’t prepared for what he saw on that tape - he watches all of it anyway. Grayson Gets Hooded JayDick (Bottom Dick) Week: Face Fucking/Leaked Sex Tape/ “Open Up For Me, Goldie.”

entry.title: Chapter 5; Heaven and Hades
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,476Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 1

Summary: The Dark Age was over, and now it was time to rebuild, the Batman that rose up from the ashes will restore Gotham, he will make it safe for everyone no matter what must be done, and no matter what monsters or rogues or demons had tried to bring Gotham back to what it was before, he would not allow them, he would face whatever was out there with no fear of the enemy, For Gotham, both of them.

entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,741Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: Summary: Five times members of the Batfamily had to call Batman to save them, and one time they all remembered at once. OR The Batfamily collectively relives their most embarrassing moments, and Jason won't stop laughing.

entry.title: Sins of the Daughter
entry.summary:
Author: HolyUsernameBatman

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 498Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Set just after Batman finds Dick Grayson and he becomes Robin, he finds a different lost soul, Helena Wayne/Bertinelli one who traveled across worlds, this is the long term affects of how this changes the family dynamics and characters both now and in the future.

entry.title: Too late
entry.summary:
Author: BlunderBee

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,785Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 69

Summary: The evidence is undeniable. Bruce Wayne has done something unforgivable. At least, that’s what everyone believes. By the time the truth comes out, Bruce has already spent months alone, abandoned by the people he loves most. The Batfamily returns to Wayne Manor ready to apologize. They’re too late. Or: Bruce dies, everyone gets traumatized, and then Jason Todd has a terrible idea involving a Lazarus Pit.

entry.title: Out of Line
entry.summary:
Author: Undercoverweirdo6967

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,803Chapters: 3/13Kudos: 39

Summary: Tim Drake and Kon-El have managed to keep their relationship hidden for months, sneaking around behind Bruce’s back while the rest of the family remains blissfully unaware. But secrets never stay buried for long. As suspicious glances, careless slips, and undeniable clues begin piling up, Bruce starts putting the pieces together—and the fallout is anything but quiet. As the Batfamily descends into chaos over the revelation, Bruce finds himself distracted by another unexpected complication: Clark Kent seems to be getting far closer than usual, blurring lines neither of them are ready to acknowledge. Meanwhile, Gotham refuses to give anyone a break. With the Joker escaping Arkham yet again and tensions running high both at home and in the field, everyone’s already frayed nerves are pushed to their limits. Between family drama, dangerous villains, hidden feelings, and long-buried truths, chaos is inevitable.

entry.title: "An Undead Wedding Day,"
entry.summary:
Author: l0singmym_nd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,077Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Elliot was your average high school student. Bullying because of him being trans, and basically the parent in his house, because his parents are drug users and alcoholics. But when he and Tim Drake, son of Bruce Wayne, get partnered up to parent an egg child for their health class, Elliot has to learn to let people help once in a while, and Tim has to learn to trust. Will they? Won't they? Stay tuned!!

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,293Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: The Batfamily finds the Batmobile parked in the cave, its occupants, Batman and Night's End, still inside, tangled together in rare, vulnerable sleep. Two hours of waiting, one impossible question, and the quiet understanding of what Bruce Wayne actually needs.

entry.title: The Madness He Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Andromeda_Child

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,020Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: She is not something that happened to him. She is something he walked toward, eyes open, cape trailing, every careful rule he built himself on crumbling at the sound of her laugh. She blows up buildings and he pulls her from the rubble. She kisses him like a threat and he lets her. She is Gotham's worst joke and his best-kept secret, and somewhere between the rooftops and the wreckage, Bruce Wayne stopped pretending he wanted her to stop. A collection of one-shots. Dark. Electric. Occasionally tender in ways neither of them would admit to.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Poltergeists For Sidekicks
entry.summary:
Author: EventualToast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,581Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 58

Summary: In most worlds, Batman has a cavalry, a unit of people who defend Gotham alongside him. In most worlds, Bruce Wayne has a family. There's surprise pancakes and cobbled together family dinners, and the rare laughter of a group of people who are all incredibly busy but determined to make time for each other.This is not most worlds.

entry.title: The Hundred Day Curse
entry.summary:
Author: SolaceInSpace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 160,744Chapters: 41/?Kudos: 5,065

Summary: Gotham was literally cursed but no one believed Bruce. He took it upon himself to fix it and after decades of searching, that solution came to him in the form of a little blue vial. Bruce was to take the curse within himself to temper it into something manageable.He thinks the others would call him stupid and stop him if they knew about this, but (un)fortunately for Bruce, his family hasn't spoken to him for forever. There was no one here to stop him.He downed the liquid and woke up as his nine-year-old self.Ch3 Excerpt:“Mother, do you remember those funny clouds above people’s heads I told you about? Well, I’m doing something about them but the process is very lonely. Or not. I think it’s just me. I’m the problem. I can’t seem to get people to like me enough to stay. I know–-… I’m aware that it’s due to my own shortcomings but sometimes, it feels like even the worst monsters have people that love them and yet I have no one.”Bruce let out a humourless chuckle and rested his forehead on his knees.“I just wish there was someone that cared about me.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Reflections Don't Lie
entry.summary:
Author: Ceru_13

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,374Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 5

Summary: What if the only way to heal the Batfamily is to break them? It was as close to normal as Gotham child tragedies could get. High school should have been normal. Where Jason Todd could mind his own business and be with someone he cared about. Where Jason Todd could feel like just once, maybe, there was stability in Gotham. Where maybe Aurelia could feel like the world wasn't waiting for her to become her mother. It shouldn't have been on him to save her. There should have been someone to catch it before anything happened. They shouldn't have died. Especially not like that. And they should have stayed dead. Stay at rest. But instead, they came back. Broken. Wrong. Sharpened into something ugly that only grief and rage with nowhere to go can create. Because they had to crawl through hell alone. When he comes back, the Bats do what they do best: Repress. Move on. Plan contingencies so this never happens again. But you don't learn lessons if you don't have to look yourself in the eye and reckon with the truth. So what happens when another mirror that can't be angled away comes back shattered into something unrecognizable? When all she does is reflect back the consequences of their moral absolutism?

entry.title: ✶⋆.˚𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐨𝐟 𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐁𝐢𝐭𝐜𝐡 .✦ ݁˖
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,158Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: Some mid-level corporate schmuck at a gala decides to mock Bruce Wayne’s breakup with Selina Kyle and imply Bruce is desperate for attention. The next morning, the entire Wayne Enterprises lobby gets a front-row seat to the consequences. Bruce is trying very, very hard not to laugh. He is failing. (or: How the Batfamily Avenged Bruce Wayne’s Dignity, One Pair of Pants at a Time)
